  txDataDecoded: {
    code: '# { "Depends": "py-genlayer:1jb45aa8ynh2a9c9xn3b7qqh8sm5q93hwfp7jqmwsfhh8jpz09h6" }\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '# UptimeBond — single-agreement SLA adjudication for a service uptime agreement.\r\n' +
      '#\r\n' +
      '# A customer pays for a service and holds that payment in escrow against a\r\n' +
      "# provider's uptime SLA. Normal completion pays the provider; a disputed\r\n" +
      '# incident is adjudicated by GenLayer validators that independently re-fetch\r\n' +
      '# immutable evidence sources and re-derive the ruling. Consensus is reached on\r\n' +
      '# the DECISION FIELDS ONLY (outcome, refund basis points, whether a maintenance\r\n' +
      '# window applies, and which SLA clauses were breached). Reasoning prose is\r\n' +
      '# explanatory and is NOT consensus-critical.\r\n' +
      '#\r\n' +
      '# Liveness: two deterministic deadlock breakers guarantee the escrow can always\r\n' +
      '# be resolved without an off-chain coordinator — see `resolve_deadlock`. They\r\n' +
      '# rely on the deterministic transaction timestamp (identical for every\r\n' +
      '# validator), never on block height (GenLayer does not expose it in-contract).\r\n' +
      '#\r\n' +
      '# Consensus boundary:\r\n' +
      '#   Off-chain owns: UI, incident intake, previews, indexing. It never decides.\r\n' +
      '#   Contract owns: escrow custody, the ruling state transition, the validator\r\n' +
      '#     agreement rule, and finalized settlement.\r\n' +
      '#   Evidence sources own: raw SLA terms and uptime facts. They are untrusted;\r\n' +
      '#     every validator re-fetches and re-derives independently.\r\n' +
      '#\r\n' +
      '# Appeals & finality: there is NO custom AI re-ruling method. Parties use\r\n' +
      "# GenLayer's native transaction appeal to re-adjudicate the `rule` transaction,\r\n" +
      '# and every settlement uses finalized transfers so funds never move before the\r\n' +
      '# accepted decision is final.\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      'import json\r\n' +
      'from datetime import datetime, timezone\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      'from genlayer import *\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '# --- Error taxonomy -----------------------------------------------------------\r\n' +
      '# Deterministic errors raised BEFORE any non-deterministic execution use plain\r\n' +
      '# UserError and revert the call. Errors raised INSIDE the nondet block are\r\n' +
      '# classified so the validator can apply the HTTP/error policy: transient and\r\n' +
      '# invalid-evidence errors both make the validator disagree (never settle).\r\n' +
      'ERROR_INPUT = "[INPUT]"          # invalid input / state / unauthorized (deterministic)\r\n' +
      'ERROR_TRANSIENT = "[TRANSIENT]"  # 408/425/429, timeout, 5xx — validator disagrees\r\n' +
      'ERROR_INVALID = "[INVALID_EVIDENCE]"  # unexpected 4xx — validator disagrees\r\n' +
      'ERROR_LLM = "[LLM_ERROR]"        # malformed model output — validator disagrees\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '# --- Lifecycle ----------------------------------------------------------------\r\n' +
      'S_AWAITING_FUNDING = "AWAITING_FUNDING"\r\n' +
      'S_AWAITING_PROVIDER_ACCEPTANCE = "AWAITING_PROVIDER_ACCEPTANCE"\r\n' +
      'S_ACTIVE = "ACTIVE"\r\n' +
      'S_DISPUTED = "DISPUTED"\r\n' +
      'S_RULED = "RULED"\r\n' +
      'S_RESOLVED = "RESOLVED"\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '# --- Resolution modes (how the agreement reached RESOLVED) --------------------\r\n' +
      'R_NONE = ""\r\n' +
      'R_CUSTOMER_APPROVAL = "CUSTOMER_APPROVAL"\r\n' +
      'R_CONSENSUS_RULING = "CONSENSUS_RULING"\r\n' +
      'R_MUTUAL_SETTLEMENT = "MUTUAL_SETTLEMENT"\r\n' +
      'R_DEADLOCK_FALLBACK = "DEADLOCK_FALLBACK"\r\n' +
      'R_PRE_ACCEPTANCE_CANCELLATION = "PRE_ACCEPTANCE_CANCELLATION"\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '# --- Ruling outcomes (locked) -------------------------------------------------\r\n' +
      'O_NO_BREACH = "NO_BREACH"\r\n' +
      'O_PARTIAL_REFUND = "PARTIAL_REFUND"\r\n' +
      'O_FULL_REFUND = "FULL_REFUND"\r\n' +
      'O_INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE = "INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE"\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '# Refund basis points (1/10000) awarded to the customer, keyed by outcome.\r\n' +
      '_OUTCOME_BPS = {\r\n' +
      '    O_NO_BREACH: 0,\r\n' +
      '    O_PARTIAL_REFUND: 2500,\r\n' +
      '    O_FULL_REFUND: 10000,\r\n' +
      '    O_INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: 0,  # no automatic settlement for this outcome\r\n' +
      '}\r\n' +
      '_SETTLEABLE = (O_NO_BREACH, O_PARTIAL_REFUND, O_FULL_REFUND)\r\n' +
      '_BPS_DENOM = 10000\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '# Deadlock deadline bounds (seconds): 1 hour .. 30 days.\r\n' +
      '_DEADLOCK_MIN_SECONDS = 3600\r\n' +
      '_DEADLOCK_MAX_SECONDS = 2592000\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '# HTTP status handling for evidence fetches.\r\n' +
      '_TRANSIENT_STATUS = (408, 425, 429)\r\n' +
      '_MISSING_STATUS = (404, 410)\r\n' +
      '_INACCESSIBLE_STATUS = (401, 403)\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '_ZERO_ADDRESS = Address(bytes(20))\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      'def _now() -> int:\r\n' +
      '    """Deterministic transaction Unix timestamp; identical across validators."""\r\n' +
      '    return int(datetime.now(timezone.utc).timestamp())\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      'class UptimeBond(gl.Contract):\r\n' +
      '    # ---- parties ----\r\n' +
      '    customer: Address\r\n' +
      '    provider: Address\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '    # ---- immutable evidence sources (fixed at construction, never editable) ----\r\n' +
      '    sla_terms_url: str\r\n' +
      '    independent_monitor_url: str\r\n' +
      '    provider_status_url: str\r\n' +
      '    maintenance_announcements_url: str\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '    # ---- escrow custody ----\r\n' +
      '    escrow_atto: u256               # customer payment held in escrow (smallest unit)\r\n' +
      '    status: str\r\n' +
      '    resolution_mode: str            # how RESOLVED was reached (R_* value)\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '    # ---- dispute / ruling ----\r\n' +
      '    incident_window: str            # human description of the disputed period\r\n' +
      '    dispute_opened_at: u256         # tx timestamp when the dispute was opened\r\n' +
      '    outcome: str                    # "" until ruled, then one of the O_* outcomes\r\n' +
      "    refund_bps: u256                # customer's applied share, in basis points\r\n" +
      '    maintenance_qualified: bool     # did a qualified maintenance window apply\r\n' +
      '    breached_clause_ids: DynArray[str]  # sorted SLA clause ids found breached\r\n' +
      '    ruling_reason: str              # explanatory only — NOT consensus-critical\r\n' +
      '    insufficient_evidence_ruled_at: u256  # tx timestamp of an INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE ruling\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '    # ---- mutual fallback settlement (only after INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE) ----\r\n' +
      '    settlement_pending: bool\r\n' +
      '    settlement_proposer: Address\r\n' +
      '    settlement_refund_bps: u256\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '    # ---- deadlock breaker config (immutable, accepted by the provider) ----\r\n' +
      '    deadlock_refund_bps: u256\r\n' +
      '    dispute_deadlock_seconds: u256\r\n' +
      '    insufficient_evidence_deadlock_seconds: u256\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '    def __init__(\r\n' +
      '        self,\r\n' +
      '        provider: Address,\r\n' +
      '        sla_terms_url: str,\r\n' +
      '        independent_monitor_url: str,\r\n' +
      '        provider_status_url: str,\r\n' +
      '        maintenance_announcements_url: str,\r\n' +
      '        deadlock_refund_bps: int,\r\n' +
      '        dispute_deadlock_seconds: int,\r\n' +
      '        insufficient_evidence_deadlock_seconds: int,\r\n' +
      '    ):\r\n' +
      '        # Deployer is the customer. Evidence sources and deadlock parameters are\r\n' +
      '        # pinned here, before the provider accepts, and are never mutated.\r\n' +
      '        #\r\n' +
      '        # `provider` arrives already decoded as an Address: constructor arguments\r\n' +
      '        # are calldata-encoded by the caller and decoded before __init__ runs, so\r\n' +
      '        # an address-typed argument is an Address here, never a hex string. Do not\r\n' +
      '        # re-wrap it — Address(Address) raises TypeError and fails deployment.\r\n' +
      '        if provider == _ZERO_ADDRESS:\r\n' +
      '            raise gl.vm.UserError(\r\n' +
      '                f"{ERROR_INPUT} Provider cannot be the zero address"\r\n' +
      '            )\r\n' +
      '        if provider == gl.message.sender_address:\r\n' +
      '            raise gl.vm.UserError(\r\n' +
      '                f"{ERROR_INPUT} Customer and provider must be different addresses"\r\n' +
      '            )\r\n' +
      '        if not sla_terms_url or not independent_monitor_url:\r\n' +
      '            raise gl.vm.UserError(f"{ERROR_INPUT} SLA terms and monitor URLs are required")\r\n' +
      '        if deadlock_refund_bps < 0 or deadlock_refund_bps > _BPS_DENOM:\r\n' +
      '            raise gl.vm.UserError(f"{ERROR_INPUT} deadlock_refund_bps must be within 0..10000")\r\n' +
      '        if (\r\n' +
      '            dispute_deadlock_seconds < _DEADLOCK_MIN_SECONDS\r\n' +
      '            or dispute_deadlock_seconds > _DEADLOCK_MAX_SECONDS\r\n' +
      '        ):\r\n' +
      '            raise gl.vm.UserError(f"{ERROR_INPUT} dispute_deadlock_seconds out of range")\r\n' +
      '        if (\r\n' +
      '            insufficient_evidence_deadlock_seconds < _DEADLOCK_MIN_SECONDS\r\n' +
      '            or insufficient_evidence_deadlock_seconds > _DEADLOCK_MAX_SECONDS\r\n' +
      '        ):\r\n' +
      '            raise gl.vm.UserError(\r\n' +
      '                f"{ERROR_INPUT} insufficient_evidence_deadlock_seconds out of range"\r\n' +
      '            )\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '        self.customer = gl.message.sender_address\r\n' +
      '        self.provider = provider\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '        self.sla_terms_url = sla_terms_url\r\n' +
      '        self.independent_monitor_url = independent_monitor_url\r\n' +
      '        self.provider_status_url = provider_status_url\r\n' +
      '        self.maintenance_announcements_url = maintenance_announcements_url\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '        self.escrow_atto = 0\r\n' +
      '        self.status = S_AWAITING_FUNDING\r\n' +
      '        self.resolution_mode = R_NONE\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '        self.incident_window = ""\r\n' +
      '        self.dispute_opened_at = 0\r\n' +
      '        self.outcome = ""\r\n' +
      '        self.refund_bps = 0\r\n' +
      '        self.maintenance_qualified = False\r\n' +
      '        self.ruling_reason = ""\r\n' +
      '        self.insufficient_evidence_ruled_at = 0\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '        self.settlement_pending = False\r\n' +
      '        self.settlement_proposer = _ZERO_ADDRESS\r\n' +
      '        self.settlement_refund_bps = 0\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '        self.deadlock_refund_bps = deadlock_refund_bps\r\n' +
      '        self.dispute_deadlock_seconds = dispute_deadlock_seconds\r\n' +
      '        self.insufficient_evidence_deadlock_seconds = insufficient_evidence_deadlock_seconds\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '    # ================================ funding =================================\r\n' +
      '    @gl.public.write.payable\r\n' +
      '    def fund(self) -> None:\r\n' +
      '        """Customer pays for the service; the payment is held in escrow."""\r\n' +
      '        if gl.message.sender_address != self.customer:\r\n' +
      '            raise gl.vm.UserError(f"{ERROR_INPUT} Only the customer funds the escrow")\r\n' +
      '        if self.status != S_AWAITING_FUNDING:\r\n' +
      '            raise gl.vm.UserError(f"{ERROR_INPUT} Escrow already funded")\r\n' +
      '        value = gl.message.value\r\n' +
      '        if value == 0:\r\n' +
      '            raise gl.vm.UserError(f"{ERROR_INPUT} Escrow must be greater than zero")\r\n' +
      '        self.escrow_atto = value\r\n' +
      '        self.status = S_AWAITING_PROVIDER_ACCEPTANCE\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '    # ===================== cancellation before acceptance =====================\r\n' +
      '    @gl.public.write\r\n' +
      '    def cancel_before_acceptance(self) -> None:\r\n' +
      '        """Customer withdraws before the provider commits. Full escrow refund.\r\n' +
      '\r\n' +
      '        Non-payable: it neither accepts nor adds value; it refunds exactly\r\n' +
      '        escrow_atto to the customer. Idempotent — after the first call the status\r\n' +
      '        is RESOLVED, so a replay fails the'... 20105 more characters,
